title: TanStack Start Full Course 2026 | Build and Deploy a Full Stack Application
summary: A full-stack application framework that addresses hydration errors and "use client" directive issues through a new approach to routing, data fetching, server functions, API routes, and SEO. The course demonstrates building Skild, a full-stack agent skills marketplace, from development to live deployment using TanStack Start.
